Automated cleanup freed 40GB but failed to resize. Manual intervention at 8 AM restored service. Root cause: log rotation misconfigured after last migration. No customer impact (maintenance window). - On-Call

Main point: Disk space alert due to misconfigured log rotation, resolved manually, no customer impact. Action items: likely need to fix log rotation configuration, maybe review automated cleanup, ensure proper resizing. So two sentences: first sentence summarizing incident and impact; second sentence stating action needed (fix log rotation, verify cleanup, prevent recurrence). Ensure exactly 2 sentences.
